query:
-- Book run lines from AN (locked — model never moves the line, only prices odds):
-- PIT @ NYM:  PIT -1.5 / NYM +1.5  → away is RL fav
-- CWS @ MIL:  MIL -1.5 / CWS +1.5  → home is RL fav
-- WSH @ CHC:  CHC -1.5 / WSH +1.5  → home is RL fav
-- MIN @ BAL:  BAL -1.5 / MIN +1.5  → home is RL fav
-- BOS @ CIN:  BOS -1.5 / CIN +1.5  → away is RL fav
-- LAA @ HOU:  HOU -1.5 / LAA +1.5  → home is RL fav
-- DET @ SD:   DET -1.5 / SD  +1.5  → away is RL fav
-- TB  @ STL:  TB  -1.5 / STL +1.5  → away is RL fav
-- TEX @ PHI:  PHI -1.5 / TEX +1.5  → home is RL fav
-- ARI @ LAD:  LAD -1.5 / ARI +1.5  → home is RL fav
-- CLE @ SEA:  SEA -1.5 / CLE +1.5  → home is RL fav

-- Game 1: PIT @ NYM — PIT -1.5 (away fav) | Model odds: PIT -1.5 at -219 / NYM +1.5 at +219
UPDATE games SET
  awayModelSpread = '-1.5', homeModelSpread = '+1.5',
  awayRunLine = '-1.5', homeRunLine = '+1.5',
  awayRunLineOdds = '-219', homeRunLineOdds = '+219',
  modelAwaySpreadOdds = '-219', modelHomeSpreadOdds = '+219',
  modelAwayML = '+110', modelHomeML = '-110',
  modelTotal = 7.0, modelOverOdds = '+121', modelUnderOdds = '+127',
  modelHomeScore = 3.76, modelAwayScore = 3.74,
  publishedModel = 1
WHERE id = 2250007;
